OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Denise Riggins.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Miguel Fernandez is not present.
Attorney Melvin Belli appearing for the defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem Ann Hipshman, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. Trial date is continued to May 20, 2013 for settlement protective date pursuant to the parties' agreement. (501/JPT)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Wendell Davis.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant is not present.
Attorney Melvin Caesar Belli appearing for the defendant in full scope.

Both parties agreed to continue the settlement conference to May 2, 2013 due to defendant's medical condition. Trial date is continued to May 6, 2013. (D501)
